top_signals.title: Burnham turns to ex-OBR and Bank of England chiefs on economic policy
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham has turned to a crop of heavyweight economic advisers, including a former Bank of England economist and the ex-head of the Office for Budget Responsibility, in a bid to bolster his economic credentials ahead of a potential Labour leadership challenge, it has been reported.  The new MP for Makerfield has sought advice from [...]

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Pound dips and stocks slip as Andy Burnham victory triggers political uncertainty
top_signals.summary: Good morning from the City AM liveblog team. Andy Burnham has secured his place in the House of Commons after a decisive by-election win in Makerfield overnight, with 54.8 per cent of the vote, well ahead of Reform’s 34.5 per cent. Top of Burnham’s to-do list is triggering a leadership challenge inside the Labour party, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ShapedPlugin update flow hacked to infect WordPress sites
top_signals.summary: Multiple WordPress plugins from ShapedPlugin were compromised in a supply chain attack that distributed infected releases to paying customers via the vendor's official update system. [...]
